driver.note: No local Ralph runtime was available, so the loop was executed directly in the repository.

issues.title: Core Workflow Contracts
issues.notes: Structured error envelope, health response model, prompt version fields, and shared response contracts are represented in code and synced into API docs.

subtasks.title: Define error response contract with request_id

issues.title: Run/Trace/Feedback Persistence Foundation
issues.notes: Persistence already existed; this loop added prompt_versions persistence migration and trace metadata export.

subtasks.title: Persist trace payload and export JSON

issues.title: Authentication and Repo Scope Enforcement
issues.notes: Request-scoped request_id, structured 401/403 responses, repo scope enforcement, scope-violation audit logging, and a pluggable local auth-provider seam are implemented. Real SSO/IdP integration remains blocked by external systems.

subtasks.title: Introduce pluggable local auth provider interface and default bearer-claims provider (local)
Add config-driven auth provider selection without external credentials (local)
Integrate real SSO/IdP claims provider adapter (blocked-external)
Define local IdP claim-mapping contract and env keys for future provider wiring (local)

issues.title: Connector Interface and Evidence Normalization
issues.notes: Evidence normalization, connector health model, and pluggable local repo/docs connector seams are implemented. Real organization system connectors remain blocked by external dependencies.

subtasks.title: Introduce connector registry/interfaces for repo/docs lookups (local)
Route repo-context collection through configurable repo/docs connectors (local)
Add external org repo/docs connector adapters and credentials wiring (blocked-external)
Add external org issue/ci connector adapters and credentials wiring (blocked-external)
Define connector timeout/auth-failure typed error contract and local fixtures (local)

issues.title: Orchestrator Execution Skeleton
issues.notes: Manager-pattern workflow execution, trace step recording, degraded-mode fallback, model/skill/prompt metadata recording are all implemented.

subtasks.title: Execute step sequence through workflow service
Record step and tool trace data
Record model, skill, and prompt versions

issues.title: Foundation Test Suite and Exit Gate
issues.notes: Auth, scope, persistence, health, structured error, and workflow behavior tests all pass.

issues.title: Plan Workflow API Happy Path
issues.notes: Plan endpoint, classification, result persistence, and retrieval are implemented and verified by tests/gate script.

issues.title: Requirements Normalization Step
issues.notes: Requirements step returns structured output and degraded fallback.

issues.title: Repo and Docs Read Connectors
issues.notes: Workspace-backed repo/docs connectors are now routed through pluggable connector seams and remain locally testable. External repo/docs systems remain blocked by unavailable credentials/infrastructure.

subtasks.title: Connector registry + provider selection integration tests for workspace behavior (local)

issues.title: Implementation Planner Step
issues.notes: Implementation step produces target modules, ordered change plan, and risks.

issues.title: Summary Composer and Confidence Policy
issues.notes: Final plan response enforces low-confidence behavior when evidence is weak.

issues.title: Feedback API and Retrieval Hardening
issues.notes: Feedback endpoint and permission-aware run/trace retrieval are implemented and tested.

issues.title: Golden Scenarios and Phase 1 Release Gate
issues.notes: Gate script executes 3 scenarios, records success/evidence metrics, and writes a JSON report.

loop.result: No local ralph executable or MCP resource found.

loop.summary: Produce Ralph-oriented PRD and Phase 0/1 backlog
Run validation and Phase 1 release gate
Sync static API documentation with current implementation
Split remaining Ralph work into local vs blocked slices and implement local auth/connector seams
Close remaining local acceptance gaps and finalize blocked-external handoff bookkeeping

next_focus: RLP-P0-03.5 implement real SSO/IdP provider adapter once target IdP contract/credentials are available (blocked-external)
RLP-P0-04.5 add repo/docs external org connector adapters once API endpoints and service accounts are available (blocked-external)
RLP-P0-04.6 add issue/ci external org connector adapters once API endpoints and service accounts are available (blocked-external)
RLP-P1-03.5 wire external repo/docs connectors into phase gate scenarios after credentials provisioning (blocked-external)
blockers: Real SSO/IdP integration target and claim contract are not available in the repository.
Real repo/docs/issue/ci systems and credentials are not available in the repository.
External connector endpoint contracts and service-account provisioning are not available locally.
